members.name: AddNode
members.signature: public void AddNode(int type, VisualShaderNode node, Vector2 position, int id)
members.summary: Adds the specified [param node] to the shader.

members.name: AddVarying
members.signature: public void AddVarying(String name, int mode, int type)
members.summary: Adds a new varying value node to the shader.

members.name: AttachNodeToFrame
members.signature: public void AttachNodeToFrame(int type, int id, int frame)
members.summary: Attaches the given node to the given frame.

members.name: CanConnectNodes
members.signature: public bool CanConnectNodes(int type, int fromNode, int fromPort, int toNode, int toPort)
members.summary: Returns [code]true[/code] if the specified nodes and ports can be connected together.

members.name: ConnectNodes
members.signature: public int ConnectNodes(int type, int fromNode, int fromPort, int toNode, int toPort)
members.summary: Connects the specified nodes and ports.

members.name: ConnectNodesForced
members.signature: public void ConnectNodesForced(int type, int fromNode, int fromPort, int toNode, int toPort)
members.summary: Connects the specified nodes and ports, even if they can't be connected. Such connection is invalid and will not function properly.

members.name: DetachNodeFromFrame
members.signature: public void DetachNodeFromFrame(int type, int id)
members.summary: Detaches the given node from the frame it is attached to.

members.name: DisconnectNodes
members.signature: public void DisconnectNodes(int type, int fromNode, int fromPort, int toNode, int toPort)
members.summary: Connects the specified nodes and ports.

members.name: GetNode
members.signature: public VisualShaderNode GetNode(int type, int id)
members.summary: Returns the shader node instance with specified [param type] and [param id].

members.name: GetNodeConnections
members.signature: public Dictionary[] GetNodeConnections(int type)
members.summary: Returns the list of connected nodes with the specified type.

members.name: GetNodeList
members.signature: public PackedInt32Array GetNodeList(int type)
members.summary: Returns the list of all nodes in the shader with the specified type.

members.name: GetNodePosition
members.signature: public Vector2 GetNodePosition(int type, int id)
members.summary: Returns the position of the specified node within the shader graph.

members.name: GetValidNodeId
members.signature: public int GetValidNodeId(int type)
members.summary: Returns next valid node ID that can be added to the shader graph.

members.name: HasVarying
members.signature: public bool HasVarying(String name)
members.summary: Returns [code]true[/code] if the shader has a varying with the given [param name].

members.name: IsNodeConnection
members.signature: public bool IsNodeConnection(int type, int fromNode, int fromPort, int toNode, int toPort)
members.summary: Returns [code]true[/code] if the specified node and port connection exist.

members.name: RemoveNode
members.signature: public void RemoveNode(int type, int id)
members.summary: Removes the specified node from the shader.

members.name: RemoveVarying
members.signature: public void RemoveVarying(String name)
members.summary: Removes a varying value node with the given [param name]. Prints an error if a node with this name is not found.

members.name: ReplaceNode
members.signature: public void ReplaceNode(int type, int id, StringName newClass)
members.summary: Replaces the specified node with a node of new class type.

members.name: SetMode
members.signature: public void SetMode(int mode)
members.summary: Sets the mode of this shader.

members.name: SetNodePosition
members.signature: public void SetNodePosition(int type, int id, Vector2 position)
members.summary: Sets the position of the specified node.

members.name: GraphOffset
members.signature: public Vector2 GraphOffset { get; set; }
members.summary: Deprecated.

values.name: TYPE_COLLIDE
values.summary: A function for the "collide" stage (particle collision handler) of particle shader.

values.name: TYPE_FOG
values.summary: A compute shader that runs for each froxel of the volumetric fog map.

values.name: TYPE_FRAGMENT
values.summary: A fragment shader, operating on fragments (pixels).

values.name: TYPE_LIGHT
values.summary: A shader for light calculations.

values.name: TYPE_MAX
values.summary: Represents the size of the [enum Type] enum.

values.name: TYPE_PROCESS
values.summary: A function for the "process" stage of particle shader.

values.name: TYPE_PROCESS_CUSTOM
values.summary: A function for the "process" stage of particle shader, with customized output.

values.name: TYPE_SKY
values.summary: A shader for 3D environment's sky.

values.name: TYPE_START
values.summary: A function for the "start" stage of particle shader.

values.name: TYPE_START_CUSTOM
values.summary: A function for the "start" stage of particle shader, with customized output.

values.name: TYPE_TEXTURE_BLIT
values.summary: A shader used to process blit calls to a DrawableTexture.

values.name: TYPE_VERTEX
values.summary: A vertex shader, operating on vertices.

values.name: VARYING_MODE_FRAG_TO_LIGHT
values.summary: Varying is passed from [code]Fragment[/code] function to [code]Light[/code] function.

values.name: VARYING_MODE_MAX
values.summary: Represents the size of the [enum VaryingMode] enum.

values.name: VARYING_MODE_VERTEX_TO_FRAG_LIGHT
values.summary: Varying is passed from [code]Vertex[/code] function to [code]Fragment[/code] and [code]Light[/code] functions.

values.name: VARYING_TYPE_BOOLEAN
values.summary: Varying is of type [bool].

values.name: VARYING_TYPE_FLOAT
values.summary: Varying is of type [float].

values.name: VARYING_TYPE_INT
values.summary: Varying is of type [int].

values.name: VARYING_TYPE_MAX
values.summary: Represents the size of the [enum VaryingType] enum.

values.name: VARYING_TYPE_TRANSFORM
values.summary: Varying is of type [Transform3D].

values.name: VARYING_TYPE_UINT
values.summary: Varying is of type unsigned [int].

values.name: VARYING_TYPE_VECTOR_2D
values.summary: Varying is of type [Vector2].

values.name: VARYING_TYPE_VECTOR_3D
values.summary: Varying is of type [Vector3].

values.name: VARYING_TYPE_VECTOR_4D
values.summary: Varying is of type [Vector4].
